history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A black and white, close-up portrait of a young person with dark, messy hair covering part of their forehead. Their right hand is brought up to their face, covering their nose and mouth, with fingers splayed across their skin. One eye is clearly visible, looking directly at the camera with a dark pupil and a subtle glint. The person is wearing a dark t-shirt with a bold, abstract white pattern that resembles bones or lightning strikes. The background is dark and out of focus, with hints of a textured wall or ceiling in the upper left corner, featuring a geometric, diamond-shaped pattern. The lighting is dramatic and moody, with strong shadows casting across the face and body, creating a sense of mystery and introspection. The overall mood is dark, edgy, and slightly melancholic.
